title: PMTiles
text: version 4.3, possible visualize spatial data stored memory tmap, e.g. objects class packages sf, terra, stars. package, tmap.sources makes possible visualize remote spatial data. Currently PMTiles, remote tile-based data sources supported, support remote data sources added later. run tmap.sources, besides tmap, another package required, namely tmap.mapgl, require tmap mode "maplibre":
code: library(tmap) library(tmap.mapgl) library(tmap.sources) tmap_mode("maplibre") #> ℹ tmap modes "plot" -> "view" -> "mapbox" -> "maplibre" #> ℹ rotate with `tmap::rtm()`switch to "plot" with `tmap::ttm()`

title: PMTiles
text: OvertureMaps contain large PMTiles. following one buildings, across World. can also use categorical color palette:
code: tm_shape(   "https://overturemaps-tiles-us-west-2-beta.s3.amazonaws.com/2026-01-21/buildings.pmtiles",    bbox = "Amsterdam") + tm_polygons(fill = "#ee7700") + tm_maplibre(zoom = 14) library(tmap) library(tmap.sources)  # Define the mapping building_subtypes <- data.frame(   level = c("residential", "commercial", "industrial", "educational",             "civic", "religious", "medical", "transportation",             "entertainment", "agricultural", "military", "outbuilding",             "service"),   color = c("#f4a460", "#4169e1", "#708090", "#ffd700",             "#dc143c", "#9370db", "#ff6347", "#20b2aa",             "#ff69b4", "#6b8e23", "#556b2f", "#d2b48c",             "#87ceeb"),   label = c("Residential", "Commercial", "Industrial", "Educational",             "Civic", "Religious", "Medical", "Transportation",             "Entertainment", "Agricultural", "Military", "Outbuilding",             "Service") )  tm_shape(   "https://overturemaps-tiles-us-west-2-beta.s3.amazonaws.com/2026-01-21/buildings.pmtiles",   bbox = "Amsterdam") + tm_polygons(   fill = "subtype",   fill.scale = tm_scale_categorical(     levels    = building_subtypes$level,     values    = building_subtypes$color,     labels    = building_subtypes$label,     value.na  = "#cccccc",     label.na  = "Unknown"   ),   fill.legend = tm_legend("Building type") ) + tm_maplibre(zoom = 14)

title: Authors and Citation
text: Tennekes M (2026). tmap.sources: Data Sources 'tmap'. R package version 0.1, https://github.com/r-tmap/tmap.sources.
code: @Manual{,   title = {tmap.sources: Data Sources for 'tmap'},   author = {Martijn Tennekes},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1},   url = {https://github.com/r-tmap/tmap.sources}, }

title: Data Sources for tmap
text: Provides support variety spatial data sources ‘tmap’, including remote, tiled, streaming formats. Enables use external vector raster data without requiring full data import, facilitating efficient visualization workflows.
